summary: Completed backend + frontend validation for Profile schema/UI changes. Confirmed legacy study_goal/daily_study_hours inputs are removed from UI, new grade_level/study_field fields work, preview meta-line fallback logic works, profile save/update endpoints remain stable, legacy fields are preserved during simplified payload updates, and core profile identity consumers did not regress.
critical_code_review_comments: Existing non-blocking API consistency gap remains in backend: some validation branches still return {"error": ...} with HTTP 200 instead of 4xx HTTPException (outside this task scope, but should be standardized).
test_credentials: Read /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Environment uses dev auth bypass user test@izlek.dev (MOCKED auth flow).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* profile records via public API during pytest runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI checks executed on public URL from frontend/.env at /profile. Verified options include Dil and Eşit Ağırlık, and preview fallback behavior: both -> 'Mezun • Eşit Ağırlık', grade-only -> 'Mezun', field-only -> 'Dil', none -> hidden. Save from UI succeeded and dashboard route still loaded.
rca of the issue: No regression reproduced for requested changes. Backend preservation logic is validated by create /api/profiles (with legacy fields) then update /api/profile (without legacy fields), confirming study_goal and daily_study_hours remain intact.
